description:
Typer-side helper that consumes Descr::closure_lit produced by fz-ul4.27.22.8 and resolves the return Descr of a closure invocation by consulting the spec map.

## Scope

Add a typer helper that takes a closure Var's Descr + the current specs map and produces the join of resolved return Descrs:

\`\`\`rust
pub fn resolve_closure_return(
    descr: &Descr,
    specs: &HashMap<(FnId, Vec<Descr>), FnTypes>,
    arg_descrs: &[Descr],
) -> Descr
\`\`\`

Semantics:

- closure_lit(F, capture_key): build full body key as [capture_key..., arg_descrs...], look up specs[(F, full_key)]; return that spec's exit return Descr. If no exact match, fall back to subsumption resolve via spec_registry (broadest covering key).
- Union containing closure_lits and/or plain arrow clauses: JOIN over members. Each closure_lit member resolves as above. Plain arrow members fall back to arrow_join_return (the existing path).
- Plain arrow with no singleton tag: identical to today's arrow_join_return.

## Tests

Unit tests with stub spec maps:

- resolve_closure_return_singleton_lookup
- resolve_closure_return_singleton_subsumption_fallback
- resolve_closure_return_union_of_singletons_joins
- resolve_closure_return_mixed_singleton_and_arrow
- resolve_closure_return_plain_arrow_matches_arrow_join

## Acceptance

- cargo test --workspace green; helper exists but no callers yet (added in 22.10).
- New helper called by Descr::arrow_join_return as a generalization OR kept as a separate API. Decide during implementation; pick whichever leaves arrow_join_return semantically intact for non-closure callers.

## Out of scope

- Calling the helper from cont_slot0_descr, chain_repr, codegen lowering. Pure helper-introduction ticket.

## BLOCKED BY

- fz-ul4.27.22.8 [[fz-cps-seam.closure-lit]]

## UNBLOCKS

- fz-cps-seam.makeclosure-emit: MakeClosure types as closure_lit
title: fz-cps-seam.resolve-return: closure-aware return resolution helper
